title: An Act authorizing the Massachusetts Department of Fish and Game to convey easements over certain parcels of land

abstracts.abstract: By Mr. Fernandes, a petition (accompanied by bill) (subject to Joint Rule 12) of Dylan A. Fernandes for legislation to authorize the Massachusetts Department of Fish and Game to convey easements over certain parcels of land.  State Administration and Regulatory Oversight.

actions.description: Referred to the committee on Rules of the two branches, acting concurrently

related_entities.name: committee on Rules of the two branches, acting concurrently
the committee on Rules of the two branches, acting concurrently
